areaLabel: Ridgeway West Pass, Ridgeway Watch, and Ridgeway Camp Slice
notes: Fourth real slice extends east from Ford Camp into a ridgeway pass, a watch gate, and a resupply camp. It reuses the chapter bootstrap scaffold, completeness checker, lock checklist, shared event DSL, encounter runtime, and shop overlay without scene-specific branches. Dialogue, reward values, and exact shop contents remain curated until original references are available. / 第四段真实切片从前营继续向东扩展到山脊道、岗亭和山营补给点。它复用了 chapter bootstrap 骨架、completeness checker、lock checklist、共享事件 DSL、遭遇 runtime 和商店 overlay，没有为新区域加入 scene 特判。对白、奖励数值和商店货品目前仍是人工整理版，待原始参考资料就位后再继续收口。
title: Ridgeway Camp Advance
